subject.optimization_goal: Preserve merge/comment safety gates, auto-merge boundaries, and manager-risk stops in a high-risk core-control skill.

baseline.summary: Baseline requires PR and mergeability helpers but does not explicitly block readiness on comment follow-up, unresolved review state, manager-risk stops, or unknown mergeability.

candidate.summary: Candidate adds explicit stop gates for dirty worktrees, comment follow-up, unresolved review state, unknown mergeability, failed checks, manager-risk stops, auto-merge helper use, and rollback.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve skill name and trigger discoverability.
validation_set.evidence: Baseline and candidate keep name main-sync and Trigger phrase.

validation_set.requirement: Stop on main/master branches and dirty worktree before PR or merge commands.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate has a Stop Gates section naming main/master and dirty worktree before push/PR/merge.

validation_set.requirement: Block PR_READY, merge-ready, and MERGED_DONE on comment follow-up, unresolved review, requested changes, failed checks, unknown mergeability, or missing linked issue evidence.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate explicitly names COMMENT_FOLLOWUP_NEEDED, ISSUE_COMMENT_FOLLOWUP_NEEDED, unresolved review thread, requested changes, failed checks, unknown mergeability, and missing linked issue.

validation_set.requirement: Use the auto-merge helper only after gates pass and stop for manager-only risk decisions.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate uses Invoke-CurrentPrAutoMerge.ps1 only after routine auto-merge conditions and manager-risk stop are clear.

validation_set.requirement: Translate open PR state instead of leaving a vague ready-to-merge claim.
validation_set.evidence: Both baseline and candidate use Test-OpenPrManagerState.ps1 and forbid a ready-to-merge-only report.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve no direct main push, no force push/destructive git, no credential access, no external SkillOpt dependency, and rollback.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate adds rollback plus explicit external SkillOpt, recursive AI, host-global, credential, paid, public release, and browser state boundaries.

rollback.strategy: Restore the baseline main-sync SKILL.md from the rollback artifact if the candidate weakens merge/comment safety gates.
steps: Copy examples/skillopt-core-rollout/main-sync/rollback/SKILL.md over both Codex Desktop main-sync SKILL.md targets.
Do not claim PR_READY, merge-ready, or MERGED_DONE until mergeability and comment gates pass.

final_decision.reason: Candidate strengthens high-risk main synchronization gates while preserving manager-visible reporting, rollback, and safety boundaries.
